inputs.name: predicts
inputs.meaning: Array storing the final predicted tokens for each sequence position, updated during verification process
inputs.inference_role: Output buffer for accepted tokens during speculative decoding verification

inputs.name: accept_index
inputs.meaning: Indices of tokens that were accepted during the verification process for each batch
inputs.inference_role: Tracks which draft token positions were successfully accepted in each batch

inputs.name: accept_token_num
inputs.meaning: Number of tokens accepted for each batch after verification against target predictions
inputs.inference_role: Counts accepted tokens per batch for speculative decoding efficiency tracking

inputs.name: candidates
inputs.meaning: Candidate tokens generated during speculative decoding that need verification
inputs.inference_role: Holds draft tokens from the proposal model to be validated against target model

inputs.name: retrive_index
inputs.meaning: Mapping indices to retrieve correct positions in the verification tree structure
inputs.inference_role: Provides positional mapping for navigating the speculative decoding tree

inputs.name: retrive_next_token
inputs.meaning: Index pointing to next token in the verification tree for each draft token position
inputs.inference_role: Enables tree traversal to check sibling candidate tokens during verification

inputs.name: retrive_next_sibling
inputs.meaning: Index pointing to next sibling token in the verification tree structure
inputs.inference_role: Allows checking alternative candidate tokens when primary ones don't match

inputs.name: target_predict
inputs.meaning: Target model predictions to verify against the candidate tokens from speculative decoding
inputs.inference_role: Reference tokens from target model used to validate speculative decoding results

outputs.name: predicts
outputs.meaning: Updated array of final prediction tokens after verification process completes
outputs.inference_role: Contains accepted tokens that passed verification, forming the final output sequence

outputs.name: accept_index
outputs.meaning: Final indices of successfully verified tokens for each batch after greedy verification
outputs.inference_role: Records which positions in the draft sequence were confirmed as valid

outputs.name: accept_token_num
outputs.meaning: Final count of successfully verified tokens for each batch after verification
outputs.inference_role: Provides acceptance rate statistics for speculative decoding performance
